name: PPID Spoofing Detected
notes: This rule detects PPID spoofing on the system.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Exploit.Command Execution, Audit.Command Execution Success

when the event matches LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(ppid-spoof|ppid_spoof|spoof-ppid|spoof_ppid|ppidspoof|spoofppid|spoofedppid| -spawnto )' OR LOWER("Filename") MATCHES '.*?(ppid-spoof|ppid_spoof|spoof-ppid|spoof_ppid|ppidspoof|spoofppid|spoofedppid)' OR LOWER("Description") LIKE '%selectmyparent%' OR LOWER("IMP Hash") in ('04d974875bd225f00902b4cad9af3fbc','a782af154c9e743ddf3f3eb2b8f3d16e','89059503d7fbf470e68f7e63313da3ad','ca28337632625c8281ab8a130b3d6bad') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY PPID Spoofing Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Exploit.Command Execution, Audit.Command Execution Success

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(ppid-spoof|ppid_spoof|spoof-ppid|spoof_ppid|ppidspoof|spoofppid|spoofedppid| -spawnto )' OR LOWER("Filename") MATCHES '.*?(ppid-spoof|ppid_spoof|spoof-ppid|spoof_ppid|ppidspoof|spoofppid|spoofedppid)' OR LOWER("Description") LIKE '%selectmyparent%' OR LOWER("IMP Hash") in ('04d974875bd225f00902b4cad9af3fbc','a782af154c9e743ddf3f3eb2b8f3d16e','89059503d7fbf470e68f7e63313da3ad','ca28337632625c8281ab8a130b3d6bad') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects PPID spoofing on the system.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using ProcessName (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
